/usr/bin/c++ CMakeFiles/untitled.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/untitled.dir/Processing/Shell.cpp.o CMakeFiles/untitled.dir/Processing/InputParser.cpp.o CMakeFiles/untitled.dir/Processing/CommandFactory.cpp.o CMakeFiles/untitled.dir/Commands/Command.cpp.o CMakeFiles/untitled.dir/Commands/EchoCommand.cpp.o CMakeFiles/untitled.dir/Commands/Pipe.cpp.o CMakeFiles/untitled.dir/Commands/TimeCommand.cpp.o CMakeFiles/untitled.dir/Commands/DateCommand.cpp.o CMakeFiles/untitled.dir/Commands/TouchCommand.cpp.o CMakeFiles/untitled.dir/Commands/WcCommand.cpp.o CMakeFiles/untitled.dir/Commands/PromptCommand.cpp.o CMakeFiles/untitled.dir/Commands/RmCommand.cpp.o CMakeFiles/untitled.dir/Commands/TruncateCommand.cpp.o -o untitled
